profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sunindo Adipersada Tbk engages in children's toys business in Indonesia, Asia, Europe, North America, Canada, and Australia. It operates through Original Equipment Manufacturer Products and OZco Brand Products segment. The company offers realistic, fancy, and baby toys; costumes, seasonal collections, hand puppets, utilities, and licensed products, including Oggy & The Cockroaches and Ice Age. It also provides OZco Mini Animal products, such as OZco Mini Bird Park, Mini Pets, Mini Zoo, Mini Ocean, and Mini Farm; and OZco Mini Fantasy products, including lily&Friends, Club Unicorns, and Paleo World. In addition, the company is involved in trading of playing equipment and children toys; and wholesale trading of textiles, clothing, and other footwear. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia.
